title: MagicalFuture
description: Techno magic mod for mechanisms and spells
body: This mod will allow you to create mechanisms and magic wands that will be useful in resource extraction and battles. With this mod, you can double the ore, automatically create a cobblestone and a tree, kill mobs and call a thunderstorm. And by creating mana armor and tools, it will become possible to extract resources very quickly. The mod was created using MCreator.
